tasks.subject: Fix package.json description & image URL
tasks.description:
1. Remove "Spotify now-playing" from description
2. Fix pi.image URL to point to anionzo/pi-status-panels repo instead of alasano/house-of-pi

tasks.subject: Add git stash, staged/unstaged, file count, untracked to Git panel
tasks.description:
Add to git.ts and index.ts:
1. Stash count (git stash list | wc -l) — only show if > 0
2. Staged changes vs unstaged changes (git diff --cached --shortstat for staged, git diff --shortstat for unstaged)
3. File changed count from diff stats
4. Untracked files count (git ls-files --others --exclude-standard | wc -l)
Update GitInfo type, readGitInfo(), and buildGitPanel() accordingly.
Show on title bar right side: e.g. "+15 -3 │ ↑0 ↓0" becomes more detailed with staged/unstaged/untracked info.
Keep it clean and compact.

tasks.subject: Add thinking tokens breakdown and cost/turn to Info panel
tasks.description:
In info.ts and index.ts:
1. Check if usage data includes thinking tokens and separate them from output tokens
2. Add cost-per-turn metric (totalCost / turnCount) somewhere visible
Keep the tokens line compact. Thinking tokens could be shown as a separate segment if available.

tasks.subject: Update CHANGELOG.md and bump version to 0.4.0
tasks.description:
Add version 0.4.0 entry covering:
- Git panel: stash count, staged vs unstaged diff stats, file changed count, untracked files count
- Info panel: thinking tokens breakdown, cost per turn
- Fix: package.json description removed Spotify reference
- Fix: pi.image URL corrected to own repo
- Fix: git diff HEAD for accurate shortstat
- Docs: README expanded with detailed panel descriptions and refresh behavior
Bump version in package.json to 0.4.0
